name: T3 Code Server
description: Installs T3 Code and configures a headless systemd service on Debian/Ubuntu images.

version.description: T3 Code npm package version to install.

nodeVersion.description: Node.js major version to install if Node.js is missing or too old.

port.description: Port exposed by the T3 Code server.

host.description: Interface to bind the T3 Code server to.

serveMode.description: Optional T3 runtime mode passed to `t3 serve --mode`. Set to `web` for the web runtime. Empty preserves the T3 CLI default.

serviceUser.description: User account to run the service as. `automatic` prefers the remote user, then `vscode`, then `root`.

installCodexCli.description: Install the Codex CLI automatically when it is not already present.

codexVersion.description: Codex CLI version to install when `installCodexCli` is enabled.
